attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Functions as a domestique/support rider rather than initiating decisive moves himself.
team_tactics: Deploys high-tempo pacing on key climbs for team leaders. Can inadvertently create tactical stalemates when multiple team riders reach selection (Bretagne Classic example).
terrain_preference: Capable on Monument-level climbs (Madonna del Ghisallo), suggesting comfort on sustained climbs. Positioning suggests all-rounder domestique profile rather than pure climber or sprinter.
vulnerability: Lacks individual winning punch when team numerical advantage exists. Tactical inexperience visible when co-responsibility with teammate neutralizes team strength rather than exploiting it.
key_patterns: Strong domestique work on decisive climbs, maintaining pace for team leaders (Il Lombardia)
High professionalism even in transitional contract situations, completing assigned duties despite uncertainty
Tactical inefficiency when multiple team riders in selection, failing to leverage numbers advantage
form_trajectory: neutral: Limited recent data, but 2023 shows active selection-making ability, maintaining domestique effectiveness from 2022
